category_sources: source_facts.description says Icarus Verilog is a Verilog simulation and synthesis tool; official documentation covers usage, simulation, Verilog targets, and developer support.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://steveicarus.github.io/iverilog/ uses the title Icarus Verilog.
docs_sources: Official documentation site is dedicated to Icarus Verilog usage and developer documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation identify Verilog simulation/synthesis and HDL tooling.
